events.event_description: Frederick Augustine Sterling presented credentials as the first U.S. Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary to the Irish Free State, establishing a U.S. Legation.

evidence.quote: Frederick Augustine Sterling, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1927-02-19. Credentials presented: 1927-07-27. Left post on 1934-03-07. Note: Commissioned to the Irish Free State.

events.event_description: The U.S. Legation in Ireland was elevated to an Embassy when George Angus Garrett was promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials on the same date.

evidence.quote:
George Angus Garrett, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1947-04-10. Credentials presented: 1947-07-28. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1950-04-18.

George Angus Garrett, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1950-03-17. Credentials presented: 1950-04-18. Left post on 1951-05-27.
